allies.rationale_text: Growth-mindset can soften the fatalistic reading of the Peter Principle by treating capability gaps as learnable if support and design are real.
allies.source_quote: The Growth Mindset emphasizes the dynamic potential of intelligence, ability, and character to progress and change.

antagonists.rationale_text: Commitment-and-consistency-bias can keep organizations defending a promotion decision after capability mismatch becomes visible.
antagonists.source_quote: the leader must cultivate intellectual humility

structured_tensions.tension_text: Peter-principle conflicts with growth-mindset when growth mindset assumes anyone can learn their way out of role incompetence at every hierarchical level.
structured_tensions.source_quote: peter-principle conflicts with growth-mindset (growth mindset) when growth mindset assumes anyone can learn their way out of role incompetence at every hierarchical level.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Peter-principle conflicts with specialization when deep specialist competence is rewarded with generalist leadership roles requiring entirely different skills.
structured_tensions.source_quote: peter-principle conflicts with specialization (specialization) when deep specialist competence is rewarded with generalist leadership roles requiring entirely different skills.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
